spec_match.rationale: Exceptional test suite. Maps every single accessibility, focus, and stacking contract of popover=hint coexisting with popover=auto.

interactive.rationale: Very interactive: features a live checklist that automatically ticks off criteria as keyboard events are captured, paired with a timestamped log console.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned perfectly with the parent keyboard accessibility concept description.

edge_cases.rationale: Pristine event handling: correctly positions overlays dynamically, manages focus restoration after light dismissals, and tracks toggle states cleanly.

references.rationale: Properly references the official ChromeStatus feature page.

design_system.rationale: Superb formatting using clear outlines, color-coded badges, and neat checklist grid items.
